title: View dashboard KPI cards after successful login
description: Verifies an authenticated user can reach the dashboard and see core KPI information displayed.

title: Dashboard charts and widgets render for authenticated user
description: Verifies the dashboard loads chart/widget content and the user can see multiple visualization widgets.

title: Dashboard displays margin-related KPI content
description: Verifies margin KPIs are presented on the dashboard for an authenticated user.

title: Persisted widget order is shown after page reload
description: Verifies that after reordering widgets, a reload shows the same order (persistence).

steps.description: Drag the 'Revenue' widget and drop it after the 'Expenses' widget to reorder them

title: Reordering widgets updates visible order on the dashboard
description: Verifies the user can change widget order and the UI reflects the updated ordering.

steps.description: Drag the 'Margin' widget and drop it in a new position

title: Overdue tasks section is visible on the dashboard
description: Verifies the dashboard shows an overdue task tracking area for authenticated users.

title: Invalid login prevents access to dashboard KPIs (negative auth case)
description: Verifies incorrect credentials do not allow access to the dashboard content.

title: Dashboard shows a loading state then displays KPI data
description: Verifies the dashboard provides visible feedback while KPI data is loading and then shows KPI labels.

steps.description: Wait for the dashboard content to appear

title: Access Comercial module and view Kanban pipeline stages
description: Verifies an authenticated user can open the Comercial module and see the main Kanban pipeline stages.

title: Verify all main pipeline columns are visible on Comercial Kanban
description: Verifies the Kanban board shows the expected deal stages including Proposta, Fechado, and Perdido.

title: Create a new deal with required fields and see it on the Kanban board
description: Verifies a user can create a deal via the UI and see it appear in the selected stage column.

title: Negative: attempt to create a deal without selecting a client
description: Verifies the UI prevents saving a deal when a required field (client) is missing and shows a visible validation message.

title: Open a deal card and verify deal details are displayed
description: Verifies a user can open an existing deal and view its details panel/page.

steps.description: Click on the first visible deal card in the Kanban board

title: Move a deal to the Proposta stage (stage change reflected on board)
description: Verifies a deal can be moved to the Proposta column and the new stage is reflected visually on the Kanban board.

steps.description: Click on the first visible deal card in the Kanban board

title: Open Clients area from Comercial and verify client list is visible
description: Verifies the user can navigate to the Clients section within Comercial and see a visible list/table area.

title: Open Meetings area from Comercial and verify meetings section is visible
description: Verifies the user can navigate to the Meetings section within Comercial and see the meetings UI.

title: View commissions section and verify commission content is visible
description: Verifies the user can open the commissions area and see commission-related UI elements.

title: Initiate CSV export from Comercial and verify export UI feedback
description: Verifies the user can start the CSV export flow from the UI and sees a visible indication that export started or is ready.

steps.description: Select "CSV" from the export format dropdown

title: Access Financeiro module after login
description: Verifies that an authenticated user can open the Financeiro module landing page.

steps.description: Click on the "Sign in" or "Login" button

title: View transactions list and totals for a date range
description: Verifies that the transactions list and summary totals are displayed for a selected date range.

steps.description: Click on the "Sign in" or "Login" button
Select a start date of "2026-01-01" in the date range start field
Select an end date of "2026-01-31" in the date range end field

title: Create an income transaction and verify it appears in the list
description: Verifies that a user can create an income transaction and see it reflected in the UI list.

steps.description: Click on the "Sign in" or "Login" button
Click on the "Add transaction" or "New transaction" button
Select "Income" in the transaction type control

title: Save a new income transaction (confirmation and list update)
description: Verifies that saving a new income transaction shows confirmation and updates the visible list.

steps.description: Click on the "Sign in" or "Login" button
Click on the "Add transaction" or "New transaction" button
Select "Income" in the transaction type control

title: Create a recurring payment from an existing transaction template
description: Verifies that a user can create a recurrence and sees it listed in the Recurring section.

steps.description: Click on the "Sign in" or "Login" button
Select an available transaction template from the template selector

title: Open DRE report for a year and verify charts/summary appear
description: Verifies that the DRE report page/section loads for a selected year and shows report outputs.

steps.description: Click on the "Sign in" or "Login" button
Scroll down to the DRE summary section within the Movimentações page

title: Delete transaction requires confirmation modal (cancel path)
description: Verifies that deleting a transaction prompts a confirmation modal and cancel leaves the transaction unchanged.

steps.description: Click on the "Sign in" or "Login" button
Click on the delete icon/button for the first visible transaction row

title: Form validation when creating a transaction with missing required fields
description: Verifies that the UI prevents saving when required transaction fields are empty and shows a visible validation message.

steps.description: Click on the "Sign in" or "Login" button
Click on the "Add transaction" or "New transaction" button

title: Access Operacional Kanban board after login
description: Verifies an authenticated user can open the Operacional page and see the Kanban columns.

steps.description: Click on "Operacional" in the main navigation menu

title: Kanban board shows all expected columns
description: Verifies the Operacional Kanban board renders all four status columns.

steps.description: Click on "Operacional" in the main navigation menu

title: Kanban board shows 'Finalizado' column and task cards area
description: Verifies the 'Finalizado' column is visible and the board area is present for task cards.

steps.description: Click on "Operacional" in the main navigation menu

title: Create a new task with required fields
description: Verifies a user can create a new operational task and see it appear on the Kanban board.

steps.description: Click on "Operacional" in the main navigation menu
Click on the "Nova Tarefa" (New Task) button
Type "E2E Task - Criar" into the "Título" (Title) field
Verify text "E2E Task - Criar" is visible

title: Create a task with optional details (description, priority, difficulty, deadline, assignee)
description: Verifies a user can fill extended task fields and save without UI validation errors.

steps.description: Click on "Operacional" in the main navigation menu
Click on the "Nova Tarefa" (New Task) button
Type "E2E Task - Completa" into the "Título" (Title) field
Type "Descrição de teste para validação E2E" into the "Descrição" (Description) field

title: Edit an existing task title and confirm it updates on the board
description: Verifies a user can open a task, edit its title, save, and see the updated title displayed.

steps.description: Click on "Operacional" in the main navigation menu
Click on the first visible task card in "A Fazer"
Verify element "Task details dialog" is visible

title: Change task status using non-drag controls (if available)
description: Verifies a task can be moved to another status using a status selector/button when drag-and-drop is not used.

steps.description: Click on "Operacional" in the main navigation menu
Click on the first visible task card in "A Fazer"
Click on the "Status" control in the task details
Select "Em Progresso" from the status dropdown

title: Validate UI prevents selecting an invalid status value
description: Verifies the UI does not allow setting an unsupported task status (invalid value should not be selectable).

steps.description: Click on "Operacional" in the main navigation menu
Click on the first visible task card in any column
Click on the "Status" control in the task details
Verify text "Status inválido" is not visible

title: Delivery Radar (due soon/overdue) view shows tasks list section
description: Verifies the UI section associated with upcoming/overdue tasks is visible (Delivery Radar).

steps.description: Click on "Operacional" in the main navigation menu
Verify element "Upcoming tasks list" is visible

title: Access Directory and load Clients list
description: Verifies an authenticated user can open the Directory module and see the clients list rendered.

steps.description: Verify an element "Clients list" is visible

title: Search clients filters the list results
description: Verifies the client search field filters visible client rows based on the entered query.

steps.description: Verify an element "Filtered client results" is visible

title: Create a new client successfully
description: Verifies a user can create a new client and see it appear in the clients list.

steps.description: Click on the "Novo cliente" (New client) button
Verify text "Cadastrar cliente" (Create client) is visible
Type "Cliente Teste E2E" into the "Nome" (Name) field
Verify text "Cliente Teste E2E" is visible

title: Delete client shows confirmation modal and allows cancel
description: Verifies the delete action requires confirmation and that cancel keeps the client in the list.

steps.description: Click on the delete (Excluir) icon/button for the first client in the results
Verify text "Confirmar exclusão" (Confirm deletion) is visible
Verify the client row is still visible in the list

title: Delete client blocked when there are active subscriptions
description: Verifies the UI surfaces an error message when attempting to delete a client with active subscriptions.

steps.description: Click on the delete (Excluir) icon/button for the first client in the results
Verify text "Confirmar exclusão" (Confirm deletion) is visible
Verify text "Client has active subscriptions" is visible

title: Open Mensalidades tab and verify subscription section renders
description: Verifies the Mensalidades (subscriptions) tab loads and shows the subscription management area.

steps.description: Verify an element "Subscriptions list" is visible

title: Open Collaborators tab and verify list renders with module access info
description: Verifies the Colaboradores (collaborators) tab loads and shows collaborator entries with access flags visible.

steps.description: Verify an element "Collaborators list" is visible

title: Admin can access Settings page and see user management section
description: Verifies a logged-in admin can open the Settings page and see key configuration areas.

title: View existing users list in Settings
description: Verifies the users list loads and displays key user/role information in Settings.

title: Invite a new user with a role and module access
description: Verifies an admin can add/invite a user by providing email, selecting a role, choosing modules, and seeing a success confirmation.

steps.description: Click on the "Adicionar usuário" (Add user/Invite user) button
Click on the first available module access checkbox

title: Validation errors shown when inviting user with missing required fields
description: Verifies the invite user form blocks submission and shows visible validation when required fields are missing.

steps.description: Click on the "Adicionar usuário" (Add user/Invite user) button

title: Change an existing user role to member
description: Verifies an admin can edit a user's role and sees a visible confirmation of the change.

steps.description: Click on the first user's "Editar" (Edit) action

title: Non-admin cannot promote a user to admin (permission denied)
description: Verifies a non-admin user cannot change another user's role to admin and sees a visible permission/forbidden message.

steps.description: Click on the first user's "Editar" (Edit) action

title: Manage commission tiers (faixas/patentes) and save changes
description: Verifies the commission tiers section is accessible and changes can be saved with a visible confirmation.

title: Update notification settings and verify confirmation
description: Verifies notification settings can be adjusted and saved with a visible confirmation message.

steps.description: Click on the first notification toggle/checkbox

title: View calendar page loads and shows an events grid
description: Verifies the Calendar page loads successfully after login and displays the calendar UI.

title: Calendar shows events for the current visible date range
description: Verifies that after navigating to the Calendar page, scheduled events appear in the grid for the visible range.

title: Create a new event successfully from the calendar UI
description: Verifies an event can be created with valid data and appears on the calendar after saving.

steps.description: Type "Reunião de teste" into the Title field
Verify text "Reunião de teste" is visible

title: Create event validation: missing required fields shows an error
description: Verifies the UI prevents saving an event when required fields are missing and shows a visible validation message.

title: Conflict check: creating an event with conflicting participant times shows conflict message
description: Verifies the calendar shows a visible conflict error when attempting to create an event that conflicts for a participant.

steps.description: Type "Evento conflitante" into the Title field

title: Navigate calendar between periods and see the view update
description: Verifies the user can move to the next/previous period (month/week) and the calendar view updates visibly.

title: Open an event details view from the calendar
description: Verifies that clicking an existing event opens a details surface with event information visible.

steps.description: Click on an existing event in the calendar grid

title: Open Chat page and see conversations list
description: Verifies an authenticated user can open Chat and see the conversations UI and at least the conversations section.

title: Create a new conversation with valid participants
description: Verifies a user can start a new conversation by providing participants and a subject and then see it appear in the UI.

title: New conversation validation when subject is empty
description: Verifies the UI prevents creating a conversation when the subject is missing and shows a visible validation message.

title: Open an existing conversation and view message thread
description: Verifies a user can select a conversation and see the message thread area for that conversation.

steps.description: Click on the first conversation in the conversations list

title: Send a message in an opened conversation
description: Verifies a user can type and send a message and then see it appear in the message thread.

steps.description: Click on the first conversation in the conversations list
Type "Hello from UI test" into the message input field

title: Prevent sending an empty message
description: Verifies the UI blocks sending a blank message and provides visible feedback or keeps the message list unchanged.

steps.description: Click on the first conversation in the conversations list

title: Non-participant cannot send message (403 shown as UI error)
description: Verifies the UI shows an error when the user tries to send a message to a conversation they are not a participant of.

steps.description: Click on a conversation labeled "Restricted" or "No access" in the conversations list (if present)
Type "Test message" into the message input field

title: Graceful handling when conversations list is empty
description: Verifies the Chat page displays an empty-state message when the user has no conversations.

title: Access Templates page and view templates and categories
description: Verifies the Templates page loads successfully and shows template and category content.

steps.description: Click on "Templates" in the main navigation/menu

title: Create a new template with a valid title/body/category
description: Verifies a user can create a new template and see it appear in the list.

steps.description: Click on "Templates" in the main navigation/menu
Click the "New Template" or "Create Template" button

title: Save a newly created template and confirm success feedback
description: Verifies saving a template shows a visible success state and the template is listed.

steps.description: Click on "Templates" in the main navigation/menu
Click the "New Template" or "Create Template" button
Type "E2E Template - Standard" into the Title field
Type "This is a reusable template body for E2E testing." into the Body field
Select the first available category from the Category dropdown

title: Create a new category with a unique name
description: Verifies a user can add a new category and see it available for selection.

steps.description: Click on "Templates" in the main navigation/menu
Click the "New Category" or "Add Category" button
Type "E2E Category - Ops" into the Category Name field
Verify text "E2E Category - Ops" is visible

title: Validate required fields when creating a template (missing title)
description: Verifies the template form blocks saving and shows a visible validation message when Title is empty.

steps.description: Click on "Templates" in the main navigation/menu
Click the "New Template" or "Create Template" button
Type "Body without a title" into the Body field
Select the first available category from the Category dropdown
Verify text "Title is required" or "Required" is visible

title: Validate required fields when creating a template (missing body)
description: Verifies the template form blocks saving and shows a visible validation message when Body is empty.

steps.description: Click on "Templates" in the main navigation/menu
Click the "New Template" or "Create Template" button
Type "Template with empty body" into the Title field
Select the first available category from the Category dropdown
Verify text "Body is required" or "Required" is visible

title: Cancel template creation without saving
description: Verifies the user can exit the create-template flow and returns to the Templates list without a save confirmation.

steps.description: Click on "Templates" in the main navigation/menu
Click the "New Template" or "Create Template" button

title: Access Administrativo module after successful login
description: Verifies a user can log in and reach the Administrativo page successfully.

steps.description: Click on "Administrativo" in the main navigation

title: Administrativo demand list is visible on page load
description: Verifies the demands list section renders and shows content (or an empty-state) when opening Administrativo.

steps.description: Click on "Administrativo" in the main navigation

title: Create a new demand successfully from Administrativo
description: Verifies a user can create a new demand using the UI and sees it appear in the demands list.

steps.description: Click on "Administrativo" in the main navigation
Click on the "Nova Demanda" or "Criar Demanda" button
Type "Demanda E2E - Criar" into the "Título" field

title: Validate required fields when creating a demand
description: Verifies the UI blocks creation when required fields are missing and shows a visible validation message.

steps.description: Click on "Administrativo" in the main navigation
Click on the "Nova Demanda" or "Criar Demanda" button

title: Cancel demand creation and ensure no new demand is added
description: Verifies a user can cancel demand creation and returns to the list without creating an item.

steps.description: Click on "Administrativo" in the main navigation
Click on the "Nova Demanda" or "Criar Demanda" button

title: Open History/Audit logs viewer from Administrativo
description: Verifies the history (audit logs) area is reachable and renders a visible logs list or empty-state.

steps.description: Click on "Administrativo" in the main navigation

title: Filter History by entity = Demandas (if filter exists)
description: Verifies the user can scope the history viewer to Demandas and sees the filter reflected on screen.

steps.description: Click on "Administrativo" in the main navigation

title: Insufficient permission shows an access denied state in Administrativo
description: Verifies the UI shows a visible forbidden/denied message if the logged-in user lacks permission for demands.

steps.description: Click on "Administrativo" in the main navigation

title: View notification history page from the application shell
description: Verifies the user can open the Notifications history page and see the page content load.

steps.description: Click on the "Notifications" (or bell) option in the header/navigation

title: Unread badge is visible when there are unread notifications
description: Verifies the bell indicator shows an unread count badge when unread notifications exist for the logged-in user.

steps.description: Verify element "Notifications bell icon" is visible
Verify element "Unread notifications badge" is visible

title: Unread badge is not visible when there are zero unread notifications
description: Verifies the bell indicator does not display an unread badge when unread count is zero.

steps.description: Verify element "Notifications bell icon" is visible
Click on the "Notifications" (or bell) option in the header/navigation
Verify element "Unread notifications badge" is not visible

title: Mark a single notification as read from the history list
description: Verifies a user can mark one notification as read and see its read state reflected in the UI.

steps.description: Click on the "Notifications" (or bell) option in the header/navigation
Click on the first notification item in the list

title: Mark multiple notifications as read using a bulk action
description: Verifies bulk mark-as-read works and the selected notifications reflect a read state afterward.

steps.description: Click on the "Notifications" (or bell) option in the header/navigation
Click on the selection checkbox for the first notification in the list
Click on the selection checkbox for the second notification in the list
Click on the "Mark as read" bulk action button

title: Notification history supports pagination (next page)
description: Verifies the user can navigate to the next page of notification history when pagination controls exist.

steps.description: Click on the "Notifications" (or bell) option in the header/navigation

title: Empty state is shown when there are no notifications
description: Verifies the Notifications page shows a clear empty-state message when the user has no notifications.

steps.description: Click on the "Notifications" (or bell) option in the header/navigation

title: Graceful error message when marking a notification as read fails
description: Verifies the UI shows a visible error state if a mark-as-read action cannot be completed (e.g., item no longer exists).

steps.description: Click on the "Notifications" (or bell) option in the header/navigation
Click on a notification item labeled as "Removida" or "Indisponível" (if present)
Click on the "Mark as read" action for that notification
Verify text "Não foi possível marcar como lida" is visible

title: Render sidebar for authenticated user (permitted links, avatar, notifications)
description: Verifies the sidebar loads after login and shows core UI elements and allowed navigation entries.

title: Collapse and expand the sidebar
description: Verifies the user can collapse and re-expand the sidebar and that it remains usable.

title: Navigate to a permitted module via sidebar link
description: Verifies clicking a visible permitted sidebar item navigates to its page.

steps.description: Click on the first visible module link in the sidebar menu

title: Permissions-tailored menu: restricted modules are not shown
description: Verifies the sidebar does not display links for modules the user does not have access to (as reflected by the UI).

title: Logout from sidebar clears session and redirects to login
description: Verifies the logout action from the sidebar returns the user to the login screen.

steps.description: Click on the "Logout" / "Sign out" action in the sidebar

title: After logout, protected layout no longer shows sidebar
description: Verifies that once logged out, the sidebar is not accessible and the user remains on the login screen.

steps.description: Click on the "Logout" / "Sign out" action in the sidebar

title: Expired/invalid session results in redirect to login and sidebar collapsed/hidden
description: Verifies that when the app detects the session is invalid, it redirects to login and does not leave the sidebar usable on screen.

steps.description: Click on the "Logout" / "Sign out" action in the sidebar

title: Notification bell interaction opens notifications surface
description: Verifies the notification bell in the sidebar/header area responds to click and shows a visible notifications surface.
